member.name: M:MassTransit.ExtensionsLoggingIntegration.ExtensionsLogger.Use(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Use Microsoft.Extensions.Logging for logging in MassTransit. If no LoggerFactory is provided, one will be created.

member.name: M:MassTransit.ExtensionsLoggingConfiguratorExtensions.UseExtensionsLogging(MassTransit.IBusFactoryConfigurator,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Configure the Mass Transit Service Bus to use Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.
member.param: The ILoggerFactory. If none supplied, will be created.
